name: Aquatic Ambush
desc: +25% bonus when attacking from a water square.

name: Arcane Vibrations
desc: Damage dealt by this Hero is not reduced by the Crystallian Trait. (Crystallian receives -90% damage unless attack exceeds health, and is unaffected by Finishing Blow)

name: Backstab
desc:
25% bonus when there is an ally directly behind the target. 

(Ranged and Magic Attacks can only Backstab when the target is adjacent to attacker.)

[Despite the tooltip, so far there is no known hero with a ranged/magic attack with Backstab, though a Spire/Dungeon Crawl buff can give a hero such benefits]

name: Bad Medicine
desc: Deals Poisoned, Acid or Weakening Poison randomly, when damaging enemies.

name: Ballistic
desc:
Can shoot Ranged attacks over 1 ally per .

exclusive to Javalineers, only Agil and Aquatic Agil have multiple Ballistic talents without merging as of Nov 2024 (five star heroes can generally get an extra ballistic at merge 3)
Category:Talent

name: Blitz
desc:
+25% attack bonus while at full Health.

(it is technically above 99% of health, but most heroes with blitz don’t have enough health for this to really matter against most attacks)

name: Brutal Attack
desc:
Reduces target's Defense by 25% of damage dealt.

This is mostly used to prevent healing (narrows down range where they can be healed), and make it harder for enemies to activate Resilience like effects. It may be bad with enemies who gain boosts with full health.

name: Brutal Backstab
desc:
When there is an ally directly behind the target, gain +25% attack bonus, and target's Defense is reduced by 25% of damage dealt.

(Ranged and Magic Attacks can only Backstab when the target is adjacent to attacker.)

name: Cardinal Aim
desc: +25% attack bonus to attacks to four cardinal directions: North, South, East and West.

name: Chord of Blitz
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% attack bonus while at full health.

name: Chord of Cardinal Aim
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% attack bonus to cardinal attacks.

name: Chord of Critical Attack
desc:
Allies within the support pattern gain +10% chance to deal a Critical Attack.

Critical Attacks deal double damage.

name: Chord of Exploit Weakness
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% attack bonus to targets with less than 100% Health.

name: Chord of Point Blank
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% attack bonus when attacking adjacent or diagonally adjacent targets.

name: Critical Attack
desc:
+10% chance to deal a Critical Attack.

Critical Attacks deal double damage. (This effect is individually calculated for every attack that hits a target. So two hits on a big enemy can each land a critical attack. This attack fails on Ghosts)

name: Critical Attack: Freeze
desc: +10% chance to deal a Critical Hit. Critical Hits deal an extra Freeze when damaging enemies.

name: Critical Attack: Ignite
desc: +10% chance to deal a Critical Hit. Critical Hits deal an extra Burning when damaging enemies.

name: Critical Distraction
desc:
Heroes with Critical Attack or Backstab have guaranteed Critical Attacks on enemies within this character's attack pattern.

[Does not work with special named Backstabs such as Brutal Backstab, life draining backstab, but does work with heroes who have differently named Critical attacks. Does not affect themself if they have critical attack. They do not have to be the one to help pull off the backstab - your ally can backstab in any way they wish, as long as this character's attack includes the target]

name: Crushing Blow
desc: Deals Fracture when damaging a target.

name: Cutlass & Flintlock
desc:
If there are no targets in melee range, shoots in four cardinal directions instead.

Heroes with this Trait still count as Melle Heroes for Quests, Dragonspire and Gear.

name: Dauntless
desc: Able to deal up to twice the damage normally possible against Stalwart  and Sturdy  Enemies.

name: Dazzling
desc: Deals 3x Dazzled on attack.

name: Death Blow
desc:
Deals Inevitable Death when damaging enemies.

Prevents Cheat Death from activating (even 2x Cheat Death). This status stays on the unit until the end of the battle.

name: Demoralizing Strike
desc:
When attacking in only one direction, deals Demoralized on melee and ranged enemies.

Target also gains Strike Immunity.

name: Diagonal Aim
desc: 25% bonus to diagonal attacks.

name: Disorienting Strike
desc:
Deals Disoriented on attack.

Target also gains Strike Immunity.

name: Eagle Eye
desc:
Attacks have a +100% Critical Hit chance when there's at least 4 squares between the attacker and the target.

When combined with a Magic Attack, only the nearest target is affected by this Trait.

name: Entangle
desc: Deals Entangled when dealing damage with Ranged Attacks. Big, Ethereal and Fleet-Footed enemies cannot be Entangled.

name: Exploit Weakness
desc:
+25% attack bonus to targets with less than 100% Health.

(although unstated, this doesn’t apply to monsters above 99% health, in case you were facing a very specific situation)

name: Favored Odds
desc: +50% bonus to attacks when there are less or equal amount of enemies on the battlefield as heroes.

name: Finishing Blow
desc: 25% bonus to attacks when it is required to kill the target.

name: Flank
desc:
All attacks against enemies within the attack pattern of this character gain 25% bonus.

(This excludes the character themself)

name: Focus
desc: 25% bonus when attacking in only one direction.

name: Frostwhirl
desc: Deals Chilled when attacking in at least three directions.

name: Hamstring
desc:
Applies Hamstrung when damaging enemies.

hamstring is exclusive to hunters.

name: High Ground
desc:
+50% bonus when attacking from a Rubble Square.

Flying enemies ignore this Trait.

name: Ignition Point
desc: Deals Burning if attack damage exceeds 50% of target's Health.

name: Immobilizing Strike
desc:
Applies Immobilized when damaging enemies.

Target also gains Strike Immunity for the rest of the Stage.

name: Majesty
desc:
Allies within the support pattern gain 25% bonus.

(The person with this ability is NOT inside their own support pattern. This ability does NOT go through walls or enemies)

name: Mighty Blow
desc:
Pushes target by +1 square, or gains 25% bonus.

(When combined with a Magic Attack, only the nearest target is affected by this Trait.)

When Mighty Blow is activated, it pushes *all* the characters, both ally and enemy, behind the affected character. If mighty blow is activated, there is no bonus from extra mighty blows (even if the enemy would become impossible to push). For example, with three mighty blows and one space behind the enemy, you would push them one space and deal no more damage.

trivia: Elethas is the only Mage user with Mighty Blow, with up to three of them when fully ascended.

name: Net Grab
desc: Net attacks pull targets to the attacker, and deal Hamstrung when dealing damage. If the same attack would push and pull a target, the target gets pulled.

name: Oath of Vengeance
desc: Gains 2x Fury and 1x Impenetrable Shield at the start of the Turn if another Hero without Oath Of Vengeance has died last Turn.

name: Pact Against Beasts
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% bonus against Beast  enemies.

name: Pact Against Constructs
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% bonus against Construct  enemies.

name: Pact Against Elementals
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% bonus against Elemental  enemies.

name: Pact Against Insects
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% bonus against Insect  enemies.

name: Pact Against Sylvans
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% bonus against Sylvan enemies.

name: Pact Against Undead
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% bonus against Undead  enemies.

name: Pact of Earth
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain 25% bonus against Blue enemies.

name: Pact of Fire
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain 25% bonus against Green enemies.

name: Pact of Heroism
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% attack bonus, if they are the same Color as this Hero.

name: Pact of Moon
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain 25% bonus against Light enemies.

name: Pact of Sea
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain 25% bonus against Red enemies.

name: Pact of Sun
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain 25% bonus against Dark enemies.

name: Pistoleer
desc: +25% bonus to ranged attacks.

name: Point Blank
desc: +25% bonus when attacking adjacent or diagonally adjacent targets.

name: Predator
desc: +50% bonus to attacks when the enemy has no allies in cardinally or diagonally adjacent squares.

name: Prepared
desc: +25% attack bonus to all attacks. Lost after attack. (Gained at the start of every Stage, and whenever not attacking during a turn.)

name: Prepared Freeze
desc:
Applies Chilled on attack while Prepared .

(Will only apply one chilled regardless of how many prepared, multiple "prepared freeze" would be necessary for multiple chilled)

name: Prepared Ignite
desc: Applies Burning on attack while Prepared .

name: Prepared Rupture
desc: Deals Internal Bleeding on damaged enemies while Prepared.

name: Prepared Weakened
desc: Applies Weakened on attack while Prepared. (Based on Prepared Freeze pattern: Applies [status] on attack while Prepared)

name: Rend
desc: Applies Bleeding  when damaging enemies.

name: Resurgence
desc: Gains Fury when damaged by attack and has no Fury.

name: Rune of Earth
desc: 25% bonus against Blue targets.

name: Rune of Fire
desc: 25% bonus against Green targets.

name: Rune of Moon
desc: 25% bonus against Light targets.

name: Rune of Sea
desc: 25% bonus against Red targets.

name: Rune of Sun
desc: 25% bonus against Dark targets.

name: Silencing Strike
desc:
When attacking in only one direction, applies Silenced on magic-using enemies.

Target also gains Strike Immunity for the rest of the Stage.

name: Slay Beast
desc: +50% attack bonus against Beasts .

name: Slay Celestial
desc: +50% attack bonus against Celestials .

name: Slay Demon
desc: 50% bonus against Demons .

name: Slay Dragon
desc: +50% attack bonus against Dragons .

name: Slay Elemental
desc: +50% attack bonus against Elementals .

name: Slay Insect
desc: 50% bonus against Insects .

name: Slay Lizard
desc: 50% bonus against Lizards .

name: Slay Monstrosity
desc: +50% attack bonus against Elite and Paragon  Monsters.

name: Slay Ooze
desc: +50% attack bonus against Ooze Monsters.

name: Slay Sylvan
desc: +50% attack bonus against sylvans.

name: Slay Troll
desc: +50% attack bonus against Trolls .

name: Slay Undead
desc: +50% bonus against the Undead  .

name: Sniper
desc:
+25% bonus when attacking targets at least 2 empty squares away.
 
 (When combined with a Magic Attack, only the nearest target is affected by this Trait.)

name: Soul Blade
desc: Deals normal damage against Ghosts  when attacking in only one direction. Does not work against Big Ghosts.

name: Stunning Strike
desc:
Applies Stunned   if attack damage exceeds 0,5 of target's Health  .
 
 Target also gains Strike Immunity  , making them immune to       for the rest of the Stage.

name: Survivor
desc: +50% attack bonus when at least half of your allies have died.

name: Swashbuckler
desc: +25% bonus to melee attacks.

name: Toxic Exposure
desc: Attacks against poisoned (Poisoned/Weakening Poison) enemies have a +100% Critical Hit chance.

name: True Shot
desc: Attacks by this Hero cannot be Dodged   .

name: Unstoppable Force
desc: Breaks Impenetrable Shield  on attack and deals normal damage.

name: Venom
desc: Applies Poisoned  when damaging enemies.

name: Watery Grave
desc: +25% attack bonus when attacking enemies in Water , and deal Immobilzed  when damaging them.

name: Weakening Backstab
desc:
+25% attack bonus when there is an ally directly behind the target, and deals Weakening Poison .

(Ranged and Magic attacks can only Backstab when the target is adjacent to attacker.)

name: Whirlwind
desc: +25% bonus when attacking in at least three directions.

name: Zeal of Life
desc: Gains Lifeburst after dealing damage.

name: Scale Piercer
desc: Ignores damage reduction from Lizard-type enemies' scales.

name: Aura of Cold
desc: Deals Chilled to adjacent and diagonally adjacent attackers.

name: Aura of Fire
desc: Deals Burning to adjacent and diagonally adjacent attackers.

name: Aura of Poison
desc: Deals Poisoned  to adjacent and diagonally adjacent attackers.

name: Slay Construct
desc: 50% bonus against Constructs .

name: Bloodlust
desc: +25% bonus while below 50% health.

name: Chord of Diagonal Aim
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% attack bonus to diagonal attacks.

name: Critical Attack: Rupture
desc: +10% attack chance to deal a Critical Attack. Critical Attack deals an extra Internal Bleeding when damaging enemies.

name: Drainwhirl
desc: Regenerates 25% of damage inflicted to living enemies in Health when attacking in at least 3 directions.

name: Initiative: Heroic Blow
desc: When this character acts first, it pushes the target as far as possible or gains +100% attack bonus.

name: Life-Draining Backstab
desc:
When there is an ally directly behind the target, gains +25% attack bonus, and regenerates +25% of damage inflicted to living enemies in Health.

(Ranged and Magic Attacks can only Backstab when the target is adjacent to attacker.)

name: Power Chord
desc: Allies within the support pattern gain +25% attack bonus.

name: Pulverize
desc: Deals Fracture when damaging a target.

name: Skirmisher
desc: +50% bonus to attacks when there are no allies in cardinally or diagonally adjacent squares.

name: Testudo
desc: Gains 2x Fortified when attacking in at least three directions.

name: Clean Kill
desc: Kills do not trigger on-death effects from enemies.

name: Initiative: Melt Freeze
desc: When this character acts first, removes Frozen/Chilled from allies.

name: Initiative: Quick Attack
desc: When this character acts first, performs a quick attack before the normal action.

name: Initiative: Long Shot
desc: When this character acts first, performs a long-range attack before the normal action.
